content.en:
Rumble!!!

Xiao Yue opened her eyes, and an invincible momentum emanated.

Although for Ye Tian, Xiao Yue's menstrual transition took a few minutes, Xiao Yue had really spent 10,000 years, and had comprehended alchemy, various secret techniques, and chaotic supernatural powers, and the strength of the whole person had undergone earth-shaking changes.

"You are only one line away from breaking the shackles and becoming a ten-star god general!"

Ye Tian commented.

Immediately, Ye Tian let Xiao Yue enter the time array and began to use various top-level resources to refine her physical body, so that the alchemy technique could reach the true limit level.

Inside the Time Array, day by day, Xiao Yue has been practicing in retreat, and Ye Tian also signed up for Xiao Yue to participate in the battle for the quota of the Talent Ancestral Pool.

This time, there will be too many gods involved.

In the entire quasi-Dao realm, the number of divine generals is undoubtedly more than that of the Heavenly Monarch and the True Monarch, but the general divine generals are not qualified to participate, otherwise there are too many participants, and the major forces will not be able to arrange them.

Therefore, at the very least, a seven-star god general is required to be eligible to participate in the battle for the quota of the talent ancestral pool.

But in the true sense, the Seven Star Gods will rarely sign up, and even if they do, they don't really want to get the talent ancestral pool place, because they know very well that they are not qualified, so they are just here to communicate with other geniuses, which is their real purpose.

In the quasi-Dao realm, there are many, many gods above the seven-star level, for example, the last place in the 1,000 places on the god general list is an eight-star god general, which is enough to see how many geniuses there are in the quasi-dao realm.

If it had been before, it would have been unimaginable!

After all, any eight-star god general is enough to be a true disciple of a top power, but in today's quasi-dao realm, just one eight-star god general is nothing.

Originally, any god general who wanted to sign up needed to go in person, after all, he needed to personally prove that his strength was above the seven-star god general.

But Xiao Yue is a god general on the list of god generals, so he doesn't need to prove his strength, plus Ye Tian's guarantee, he can save his life and participate in the battle of the talent ancestral pool.

As time passed, the date of the battle for the talent ancestral pool spot was getting closer and closer.

At this time, many of the gods who were in retreat and cultivation came out one by one and rushed to the battlefield ruins.

this day.

Xiao Yue is finally out of the customs!

"Yue'er, how's it going?"

Ye Tian asked with concern.

"Husband, I succeeded!"

Xiao Yue said with joy on her face.

Seeing this, Ye Tian was also very happy.

Xiao Yue's strength has reached the ten-star divine general, coupled with the chaos divine powers he has mastered and many great divine powers, if nothing else, a quota is definitely no problem.

"Let's go, I'll take you to the battlefield ruins!"

Ye Tian took Xiao Yue's hand, tore through the space, and left the Terran territory.

Soon after.

Ye Tian followed the large army of the Void Heaven Hall to the battlefield ruins.

This time, the Void Heaven Temple also sent a large number of gods to participate in the battle of the talent ancestral pool quota this time, and even the human race has many gods above the seven-star level to participate, although it is just a formality, but it can also increase a lot of actual combat experience, see the real big scene, maybe you can also completely famous.

What's more, this time, there are many Dao Ancestor incarnations coming to watch the battle, if they are valued by a certain Dao Ancestor, they can become the personal disciples of Dao Ancestor, and their identity will go up all of a sudden.

Therefore, this is also the reason why many god generals are obviously not strong enough, but they want to participate in the battle for the quota of the talent ancestral pool.

But this time, the battle for the quota of the Talent Ancestral Pool is destined to not be simple, it is not just a grand exchange battle as they imagined.

The remains of the battlefield, a ruin has been transformed into a talent ancestral pool exchange venue.

All around, countless palaces are suspended here,

Countless True Monarchs sat in the palaces, above the endless void, and the Dao Ancestor incarnations sat on the throne and looked down, paying attention to this battle.

As for the gods who participated in the battle for the quota of the talent ancestral pool, they stood on the player's field.

At first glance, there are too many dense gods, at least 100,000.

A genius above one hundred thousand seven-star god generals, this is simply unimaginable.

I think that at the beginning, the great universe had just been born, and although many geniuses had entered the chaos, there were relatively few gods above seven stars.

And this is the first time that so many geniuses have gathered together.

In the palace of the Void Heaven Temple.

Ye Tian sat on the throne with a group of half-step True Ancestors, and looked at Xiao Yue on one of the contestants' fields.

Suddenly.

The voice of a half-step True Ancestor came from the side.

"Little junior brother, I heard that your wife also participated in this battle for the quota of the talent ancestral pool?"

The person who transmitted the sound was the Dragon Sea True Monarch of the Void Heaven Palace.

"Senior Brother Long Hai, my wife did participate in the battle for the quota of the Talent Ancestral Pool!" Ye Tianying said.

Long Hai Zhenjun frowned and said, "Little junior brother, the talent ancestral pool is indeed very magical, and even the Dao Ancestor is extremely eager, but unfortunately it can only be allowed to enter the Divine Generals or Divine Generals." Such a treasure land, no one is moved, you want your wife to enter the talent ancestral pool, I can understand this feeling. But this time, the battle for the quota of the talent ancestral pool is not simple, I'm afraid a lot of people will die!"

"I know!" Ye Tian said in a deep voice: "If it weren't for the Talent Ancestral Pool's restriction on cultivation, if the Dao Ancestors were allowed to fight, I estimate that even the Dao Ancestors would have to fall in a large area." For the sake of the battle for the quota, the gods and generals will definitely fight to the death, and the major forces will do whatever it takes, but I have full confidence in my wife!"

Seeing that he couldn't change Ye Tian's mind, Long Hai Zhenjun stopped persuading.

He didn't want anything to happen to Ye Tian's wife, if something really happened, he knew that his little junior brother would definitely go crazy, but this time the matter was too important, and the Dao Ancestor incarnation didn't know how much had come.

At this time, if you don't withdraw from the battle for the quota of the talent ancestral pool, you won't be able to withdraw later, and no one can forcibly intervene when you are fighting.

But Ye Tian is not worried, what can he do.

"Even if I used to be at the peak strength of the Nine Star Divine Generals, I am afraid that I may not be able to be safe and sound when I participate in such a battle for the quota of the Talent Ancestral Pool, and even if I am unlucky, I will fall!" Long Hai Zhenjun said secretly.

He didn't think that Ye Tian's wife Xiao Yue could be so powerful, and if she was really gifted and demonic, she wouldn't go to reincarnate and rebuild.

But he never expected that Ye Tian had a copying talent, and he could give Xiao Yue all the super-god-level talents, and he could even give Xiao Yue the fusion talent that he didn't need.

Coupled with the alchemy technique that Ye Tian deduced from the Nine Extremes True Body Technique, Xiao Yue was able to grow to an incomparably anti-heaven level.

If he knew, he wouldn't have persuaded Ye Tian.

Soon, the time was almost up.

Rumble!!!!

A Dao Ancestor incarnation appeared in the middle of the field.

Many True Monarchs and Divine Generals looked at him, but not many people knew this Dao Ancestor.

But as someone recognized it spread the word, gradually everyone knew this Dao Ancestor.

"Transcendent Force Dao Mountain's Wheel Wind Dao Ancestor!"

This is a Triple Heavenly Dao Ancestor, and he is also a top-notch Triple Heavenly Dao Ancestor.

Let a Triple Heavenly Dao Ancestor incarnate preside over this battle of the Talent Ancestral Pool, and it is the Triple Heavenly Dao Ancestor of the transcendent forces, which shows how much the major forces attach importance to this battle of the Talent Ancestral Pool.

"The battle of the talent ancestral pool, this seat only wants to say a few points, first, once involved, once the body is killed, the forces behind it must not retaliate, second, any means can be used, as long as it belongs to their own power, they can be used, but if they use the power of other strong people, then they will be killed on the spot, even if they are the son of the Dao Ancestor, they will not be able to escape; third, once they participate, they must not quit, but as long as they admit defeat in time, they can get off the field; fourth, they must compete in accordance with the rules, and they must not exceed the rules. "

"Now there are gods who want to quit, you can quit now!"

After the Wheel Wind Dao Ancestor finished speaking, many gods began to regret it.

It is not forbidden to use any means, this is a real life-and-death fight!

As for admitting defeat, you can live, but in the real battle process, the changes are too great, and in many cases, there is no time to shout the word "admit defeat"!

It is conceivable that in this battle for the quota of the talent ancestral pool, many weak people are afraid that they will die.

Suddenly, many gods regretted it and opted out.

Originally, 100,000 god generals withdrew at once, and there were at least 20,000 at once, and only more than 70,000 god generals remained.

When the number of people no longer changed, the Wheel Wind Dao Ancestor said loudly: "The battle of the talent ancestral pool quota starts now, the first round is to enter the trial space, everyone has a token, kill or defeat the enemy who admits defeat can get the other party's token, all the gods who have been robbed of the token or died will be completely eliminated, and finally the remaining 10,000 people can advance to the next round." In addition, any god general who has snatched ten tokens can leave the trial space in advance, which is to prevent the two strong from fighting, resulting in the fall or early elimination of the strong in advance!"

"What!"

Many gods were shocked, under such rules, how tragic the fight was.

If you want to save your life, maybe you have to drop the token and admit defeat when you enter the trial space, otherwise there will definitely be a lot of deaths.

Before anyone could refute or refuse, the Wheel Wind Dao Ancestor waved his hand and sent more than 70,000 god generals into a world that had been temporarily opened up before, and the pictures in the world were projected one by one.

The battle for the place in the talent ancestral pool, the first round has begun!
